creator: kiwi@caudium.net
text:
Current port/pike is pike 7.0.78 which is a bit updated.
	CVS version of pike 7.0 maybe needed for program like caudium.
	This is not a replacement for current port/pike but a possibility
	to choose a more recent pike 7.0 than the official one from
	Roxen/Idonex.
